title: SPECIAL EDUCATION SUPPORT SERVICES - 211info
text: SOUTH COAST EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT SPECIAL EDUCATION SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a range of services for children with special needs, and the school districts serving them, including IEP support and transition services. Also offers Augmentative and Alternative Communication, a Feeding Team, a Crisis Prevention Institute, and a Special Education Director. 1350 Teakwood Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 269-1611 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 269-1611 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Coos and Curry Counties, and City of Reedsport Services: Special Education Plan Development Student Disability Services Transition Services for Students with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOL BASICS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOUTH COAST EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT
